channel.title: Pierre Duchet-Suchaux on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in Pierre Duchet-Suchaux on LMI

item.title: Liquid-Liquid Equilibria Of Binary, Ternary, And Quaternary Systems Involving Monoethylene Glycol, Water, Toluene, P-Xylene, Hexane, And Octane
Liquid-Liquid Equilibria Of Binary And Ternary Systems Methanol/Water Plus N-Hexane, Plus N-Octane, Plus N-Dodecane, And Plus N-Hexadecane In The Temperature Range Between T=283.15 K And T=333.15 K
Liquid-Liquid Equilibria Of Binary And Ternary Systems Involving Monoethyleneglycol, Water, N-Alkanes At Three Temperatures: 283.15, 303.15 And 333.15 K
